The oxygen atom (O:10) appears to be part of a nitro group, bonded only to the nitrogen atom (N:9).

question: Please find neighbour atoms of atom index 10 (element: O). Neighbour atoms are covalently connected. Report their atomic indices and elements. Also return the geomconf_index.
